title: Subitems name change and importing from excel
excerpt:
Hi, 
I would like to rename the subitem name and i would like to import a bunch of subitems from excel sheet.

posts.author: alang (avi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I would like to rename the subitem name and i would like to import a bunch of subitems from excel sheet.

posts.author: KyleDanielle (Kyle Seem)
posts.cookedHtml: Being able to rename “Subitems” like you can with group titles would be extremely helpful.

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml: Any comment on this? Would it be possible?
